## Safety checklist

- [ ] No real node names, subscription URLs, UUIDs, passwords, private domains, tokens, or MITM certificate material are included.
- [ ] Public examples use placeholders such as `YOUR_PASSWORD` or `YOUR_PRIVATE_DOMAIN`.
- [ ] App login, payment, voice, update, and CDN traffic are not blocked unintentionally.
- [ ] `node scripts/validate-public-rules.js` passes locally.
